response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in full-stack development with relevant technologies such as TypeScript, Node.js, and React. They have worked on various projects that demonstrate their ability to design, develop, and maintain end-to-end features.
strengths: Proficient in multiple programming languages and technologies
Strong experience with full-stack development and relevant technologies
Demonstrated ability to work on complex projects and contribute to architecture decisions
concerns: Some experience is not directly related to the primary stack
No direct mention of experience with Nest.js or Vitest
Some projects mentioned are not directly related to the job description
